name: content-support
description: Inline-Bild im Fließtext (Buch) oder in Content-Folien — hell, dezent, nicht dominant
style_instructions: Style: Clean editorial illustration or soft photography, muted tones, understated. Color palette: warm off-white background with muted earth accents. Mood: supportive, unobtrusive, professional.
composition: Balanced composition without dominant focal point. Works well at smaller sizes. Subject sits comfortably within a media-split column (45% width). Light-mode friendly (no dark dominant areas).
negative: no text, no logos, no visible faces, no cartoon, no 3D, no saturated colors, no attention-grabbing contrast
